title: Il aimait � la voir
content:
It was in her white skirts that he loved to see
    her run straight through the branches and leaves, gracefully,
    but still gauche, and hiding her leg from the light,
    when she tore her dress, on the briars, in her flight.
meaning:
Charles Baudelaire's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Il aimait � la voir"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
